name: Problem Theorist: Smart or Not Smart

overview: Problem Theorist: Smart or Not Smart, is a Mystery Series into the future, People, animals, earth, and more Unknown things. In this series we will explore the depths of the Universe and what secrets it holds to all our unknown answers.
